parameters.query:
SELECT
  r.id AS request_id,
  r.entity_type,
  r.entity_id,
  r.requested_by_user_id,
  r.status,
  r.created_at AS request_created_at,
  e.id AS event_id,
  e.slug AS event_slug,
  e.title,
  e.description_de,
  e.category,
  e.city_id AS event_city_id,
  ec.name_de AS event_city_name,
  e.venue_name,
  e.starts_at,
  e.organizer_name,
  e.external_url,
  p.id AS place_id,
  p.slug AS place_slug,
  p.name,
  p.description_de AS place_description_de,
  p.category_id,
  pc.name_de AS category_name,
  p.city_id AS place_city_id,
  plc.name_de AS place_city_name,
  p.address_line_1,
  p.postal_code,
  p.latitude,
  p.longitude,
  p.website_url,
  p.phone
FROM ai_recheck_requests r
LEFT JOIN events e
  ON r.entity_type = 'event' AND e.id = r.entity_id
LEFT JOIN cities ec
  ON ec.id = e.city_id
LEFT JOIN places p
  ON r.entity_type = 'place' AND p.id = r.entity_id
LEFT JOIN cities plc
  ON plc.id = p.city_id
LEFT JOIN place_categories pc
  ON pc.id = p.category_id
WHERE r.status = 'PENDING'
ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
LIMIT 25;

UPDATE ai_recheck_requests
SET status = 'PROCESSING',
    error_message = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.request_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND status = 'PENDING'
RETURNING id AS request_id, status, updated_at;

UPDATE ai_recheck_requests
SET status = 'FAILED',
    processed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW(),
    error_message = '{{ (($json.worker_error || "ENTITY_NOT_FOUND") + "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.request_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id AS request_id, status, error_message, processed_at;

UPDATE ai_recheck_requests
SET
  status = 'FAILED',
  processed_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW(),
  error_message = '{{ ($json.provider_error_code || "provider_http_error").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.request_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id AS request_id, status, error_message, processed_at;

UPDATE ai_recheck_requests
SET status = 'FAILED',
    processed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW(),
    error_message = '{{ (($json.normalization_error || "normalization_failed") + "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.request_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id AS request_id, status, error_message, processed_at;

INSERT INTO ai_quality_checks (
  id,
  entity_type,
  entity_id,
  model_name,
  ai_status,
  confidence_score,
  reason_codes,
  explanation,
  suggested_action,
  raw_result_json,
  checked_at,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid()::text,
  '{{ ($json.entity_type || "event").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.entity_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.model_name || "unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.ai_status || "UNSURE").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.confidence_score !== undefined && $json.confidence_score !== null ? $json.confidence_score : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.reason_codes_json ? "'" + $json.reason_codes_json.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" : "'[]'::jsonb" }},
  {{ $json.explanation ? "'" + $json.explanation.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.suggested_action ? "'" + $json.suggested_action.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.raw_result_json ? "'" + $json.raw_result_json.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" : 'NULL' }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id AS ai_quality_check_id,
  '{{ ($json.request_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS request_id,
  '{{ ($json.entity_type || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS entity_type,
  '{{ ($json.entity_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS entity_id,
  '{{ ($json.ai_status || "UNSURE").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS ai_status,
  {{ $json.confidence_score !== undefined && $json.confidence_score !== null ? $json.confidence_score : 'NULL' }}::numeric AS confidence_score;

UPDATE events
SET ai_review_status = '{{ ($json.ai_status || "UNSURE").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    ai_confidence_score = {{ $json.confidence_score !== undefined && $json.confidence_score !== null ? $json.confidence_score : 'NULL' }},
    ai_last_checked_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.entity_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id AS entity_id,
  '{{ ($json.request_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS request_id,
  ai_review_status,
  ai_confidence_score,
  ai_last_checked_at;

UPDATE places
SET ai_review_status = '{{ ($json.ai_status || "UNSURE").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    ai_confidence_score = {{ $json.confidence_score !== undefined && $json.confidence_score !== null ? $json.confidence_score : 'NULL' }},
    ai_last_checked_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.entity_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id AS entity_id,
  '{{ ($json.request_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS request_id,
  ai_review_status,
  ai_confidence_score,
  ai_last_checked_at;

UPDATE ai_recheck_requests
SET status = 'DONE',
    processed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW(),
    error_message = NULL
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.request_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id AS request_id, status, processed_at;

SELECT
  id,
  entity_type,
  entity_id,
  status,
  error_message,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  processed_at
FROM ai_recheck_requests
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

UPDATE ai_recheck_requests
SET status = 'PROCESSING',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id
  FROM ai_recheck_requests
  WHERE status = 'PENDING'
  ORDER BY created_at ASC
  LIMIT 5
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
RETURNING *;
